headline: Jobs Report, Nike Earnings: What to Watch This Week
summary: The second quarter of the year begins on Wednesday. The March jobs report, the direction of the Iran war and an appearance by Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell will be closely watched. Auto executives will also gather in New York for a conference where higher gasoline prices will be top of mind.

headline: Is The Campbell’s Company (CPB) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CPB a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on The Campbell’s Company on r/Valueinvesting. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CPB.
